titleStmt.title: SII 23.51: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 51. (A.R. No. 51 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Āditya II Karikāla: year 5: A.D. 969-70

summary.p: This is dated in the 5th year of Parakēsarivarman ‘who took the head of the Pāṇḍya’ i.e. of Vīra-Pāṇḍya. This is the Chōḷa king Āditya II Karikāla the elder brother of Rājarāja I, whose earliest inscription mentioning this exploit is dated in his 2nd year (A.R. No. 472 of 1908), which should have corresponded with the 20th and last year of reign of his adversary. As this has been fixed at A.D. 966 Āditya's accession should have taken place in A.D. 965 (Ep. Ind. Vol. XXV, p. 37). From the Leyden Grant and the Tiruvālaṅgāḍu Plates it is known that Āditya distinguished himself even as a boy in his father Sundara-Chōḷa's battles against the Pāṇḍya. He must have been appointed co-regent by the latter even in his life-time, but was not destined to live long. The date given in the present inscription is the latest regnal year known for him so far.

The record registers a gift of 15 kaḻañju of gold made by one Śiṅgaṉ Kēśavaṉ of Nelvēli in Puṉṟiṟ-kūṟṟam for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tiruviśalūr-Perumānaḍigaḷ, with 4 uḻakku of ghee per day accruing as interest on the amount endowed. A similar gift was also made by his wife (māmagaḷ) Rāmaṉ Peṟṟāḷ for another lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastī śrī . pāṇṭiyaṉt talaikoṇṭa kopparakeśaripaṉmarkku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu vaṭakarait tevatāṉa brahma teyam Amaṉinārā
yaṇac caturvetimaṅkalattu tiruvicalūrp perumāṉaṭikaḷukku puṉṟiṟ kūṟṟattu nelveliyuṭai
yāṉ ciṅkaṉ keśavaṉ cantirātittaval Erivatāka vaitta tirunontā viḷakku 1- Oṉṟukku vaitta
poṉ kaḻañcu perttatu dharumaeṉāl vanta palicai nicatam 4 Uḻakkāka Eriya vaittatu . svastī śrī . Ivaṉ mā
makaḷ Irāmaṉ peṟṟāḷ tiruvicalūr perumāḷukku cantirātittaval Eriya vaitta tirunon
tāviḷakku 1 Oṉṟukkum vaitta kaḻañcil pertta tuḷai 10 4eṉāl vanta palicai nicatam Uḻak
kāka Eriya vaittatu cantiviḷakku Iraṇṭum paṉmāheśvararakṣai Itdharma m vaḷarppār śrīpā
tam Eṅkaḷ talaimeliṉa .�
Digital edition of SII 23.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
